_comment: Hand-curated seaward orientation (true-north degrees) for every kept surf spot. Applied by pipeline/enrich.py as Algorithm 1c, AFTER the geometric Algorithm 1 and AFTER the name-keyed manual_orientations.json (Algorithm 1b) — so a slug match here is authoritative over every other source. Slug derivation mirrors pipeline/db_import._slugify so re-enrich looks up by the same key that lands in the spots table. Stored alongside spot_coord_fixes.json: the durable, re-enrich-survivable override mechanism for orientation_deg.
